brief_justification: Arrives at exact answer (Year 16) with valid phase-by-phase simulation matching ground truth; identifies the positive feedback loop and threshold dynamics, one level beyond surface but doesn't trace second/third-order effects like groundwater-surface interaction implications; no explicit reflection on reasoning method, potential edge cases, or assumption checks during analysis; presents answer confidently without cross-checking via alternate calculation path or boundary condition tests; states conclusions as certain without noting assumptions about when-in-year recharge/withdrawal occurs or threshold boundary behavior; considers only one analytical approach with no mention of alternatives; shows phase-level derivation table allowing reproduction of key transitions but skips individual year-by-year calculations that a third party would need to verify.
